name: break-n-bake
description: Split overwhelming prompts and large refactors into a structured spec (break), then implement milestone-by-milestone with validation and auto-fix (bake).

max_fix_iterations.description: Maximum fix-agent iterations before hard stop (default: 5, hard stop at 3 no-progress).

break_threshold_files.description: Blast-radius file count above which short prompts auto-trigger break mode (default: 15).
